provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Imports Control (Exemption) (Tanzania-Zambia Railway Authority) Notice.

No import licence shall be required for importation of the material and equipment in respect of which the controller is satisfied that they have been or are to be imported by or on behalf of the Tanzania-Zambia Railway Authority are to be used for any of the purposes connected with the construction or maintenance of the Tanzania-Zambia Railway.
